en: Half the cells in your body do not contain your own DNA
They belong to bacteria protozoa fungi These tiny tenants
collectively known as our microbiota are most abundant in the gut where they aid in digestion
Most amazing they talk to your brain They influence your mood your energy
perhaps even your personality Gut bacteria produce hordes of psychoactive compounds including half a
dozen neurotransmitters This long distance conversation is facilitated by a major nerve cable that runs from your
gut to your brain It's called the vagus nerve When aggressive bacteria invade the gut wall immune
cells rush to the scene Those immune cells and related compounds can travel to the brain where they
trigger inflammation and depression A rapidly advancing treatment for mental disturbances is called
vagus nerve stimulation or VNS VNS strengthens the gut barrier
preventing pathogenic bacteria from breaching it and causing an inflammatory response that
Encouragingly the FDA has already approved VNS for the treatment of severe epilepsy and
depression unresponsive to standard therapy Of course it's early days
We don't yet know whether successful treatments will emerge from this line of research but I think you'll agree there's
